title: Space Settings
overviewDescription: Manage roles, invites, expressions, and moderation.

invites.createDescriptionDefault: Creates a link to the default text channel for this space.
invites.empty: No invites have been created for this space yet.

modal.title: Invite friends to {{spaceName}}
modal.noFriends: No friends to invite. Share the link below instead.

roles.hierarchyHint: Roles higher in the list have more authority. Drag roles to change their hierarchy.
roles.empty: No roles have been created for this space yet.

display.hoist: Display role members separately from online members
display.mentionableHint: Members with the "Mention @everyone, @here, and All Roles" permission can mention this role regardless of this setting.
display.mentionableHintShort: Members with the mention-everyone permission can still mention this role.

members.title: Role members
members.description: View and manage members assigned to this role.
members.emptyAssigned: No members have been assigned this role.
members.noEligible: No members available to add to this role.
members.addFailed: Failed to add members to role

hierarchy.cantReorder: You can't reorder roles at or above your highest role
hierarchy.cantAssign: You can't assign or remove this role
hierarchy.cantEditRole: You can't edit this role because it's at or above your highest role.
hierarchy.cantManageMembers: You can't assign or remove members from this role.
hierarchy.cantManageMember: You don't have permission to manage this member

delete.title: Delete Role
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}} role? This Action cannot be undone.

ViewChannel.label: View Channels
ViewChannel.description: Allow members to view channels by default

ManageChannels.label: Manage Channels
ManageChannels.description: Allow members to create, edit or delete channels

ManageRoles.label: Manage Roles
ManageRoles.description: Allows members to create new roles and edit or delete roles lower than their highest role

CreateExpressions.label: Create Expressions
CreateExpressions.description: Allow members to create emoji and stickers in this space.

ManageExpressions.label: Manage Expressions
ManageExpressions.description: Allow members to edit or delete emoji and stickers in this space.

ManageSpace.label: Manage Space
ManageSpace.description: Allow members to change this space

CreateInvites.label: Create Invites
CreateInvites.description: Allow members to invite new people to this space

KickMembers.label: Kick Members
KickMembers.description: Kick will remove other members from this space. Kicked members can rejoin if they have another invite.

BanMembers.label: Ban Members
BanMembers.description: Ban will remove members from this space and prevent them from rejoining until they are unbanned.

SendMessages.label: Send Messages
SendMessages.description: Allow members to send messages in text channels

EmbedLinks.label: Embed Links
EmbedLinks.description: Allow members to embed links in messages

AttachFiles.label: Attach Files
AttachFiles.description: Allow members to attach files in messages

MentionEveryone.label: Mention Everyone
MentionEveryone.description: Allow members to mention @everyone and @here in messages

UseExternalEmojis.label: Use External Emojis
UseExternalEmojis.description: Allow members to use emojis from other spaces or their own in their messages

ManageMessages.label: Manage Messages
ManageMessages.description: Allow members to delete other members messages

ReadMessageHistory.label: Read Message History
ReadMessageHistory.description: Allow members to read message history

Connect.label: Connect
Connect.description: Allow members to connect to voice channels

Speak.label: Speak
Speak.description: Allow members to speak in voice channels

Administrator.label: Administrator
Administrator.description: Members with this permission will have every permission. This is a dangerous permission to grant.
Administrator.descriptionBefore: Members with this permission will have every permission.
Administrator.descriptionDanger: This is a dangerous permission to grant

expressions.pageDescription: Upload and manage custom emoji and stickers for this space.
expressions.emojiLimit: Sadly current limit of emojis you can upload are 100, since the app is in beta and storage is an issue for now
expressions.stickerLimit: Sadly current limit of stickers you can upload are 100, since the app is in beta and storage is an issue for now

bans.title: Space Ban List
bans.description: View and manage the list of banned users in this space. As of right now the ban is account based, we will be introducing IP bans in the future.
bans.descriptionShort: View and manage banned users in this space.
bans.searchPlaceholder: Search Bans by User ID or Username or Display Name
bans.searchPlaceholderShort: Search by username or user ID
bans.empty: No one has been banned yet

moderation.kickBody: Are you sure you want to kick @{{name}} from the space? They will need an invite to rejoin.

channels.reorderHint: Drag channels to reorder them. Place a channel directly under a category to add it to that group. Drag above a category to remove it from the group.
channels.topicHint: Shown to members at the top of the channel.
channels.noChannelInvites: No invites have been created for #{{channel}} yet.
channels.selectOverwriteTarget: Select an overwrite target to edit channel-specific permissions.

create.title: Create Channel
create.name: Channel Name
create.voiceDescription: Hang out with voice and video

delete.title: Delete Channel
delete.body: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

deleteCategory.title: Delete category "{{name}}"?
deleteCategory.body: Would you like to delete this category?

permissions.selectTargetHint: Select a role or member to configure channel-specific permissions.
permissions.selectTargetHintLeft: Select a role or member on the left to edit their permissions for this channel, or click + to add one.

ViewChannel.label: View Channel
ViewChannel.description: Allow members to view this channel

ManageChannels.label: Manage Channel
ManageChannels.description: Allow members to edit or delete this channel

ManageRoles.label: Manage Permissions
ManageRoles.description: Allow members to edit this channel's permission overwrites

SendMessages.label: Send Messages
SendMessages.description: Allow members to send messages in this channel

UseExternalEmojis.label: Use External Emojis
UseExternalEmojis.description: Allow members to use emojis from other spaces

ManageMessages.label: Manage Messages
ManageMessages.description: Allow members to delete others' messages

ReadMessageHistory.label: Read Message History
ReadMessageHistory.description: Allow members to read past messages

Connect.label: Connect
Connect.description: Allow members to connect to this voice channel

Speak.label: Speak
Speak.description: Allow members to speak in this voice channel

confirm.deleteSpaceBody: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This Action cannot be undone.
confirm.leaveSpaceBody: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}? This Action cannot be undone.

lockdown.title: This space is in lockdown
lockdown.ownerMessage: Messaging and changes are disabled. Check your email for an appeal link if you believe this was a mistake.
lockdown.memberMessage: Messaging and changes are disabled while staff review this space.
lockdown.toast: This space is in lockdown. Messaging and changes are disabled.
